headline: Q4 Earnings Highs And Lows: Brown & Brown (NYSE:BRO) Vs The Rest Of The Insurance Brokers Stocks
summary: Quarterly earnings results are a good time to check in on a company’s progress, especially compared to its peers in the same sector. Today we are looking at Brown & Brown (NYSE:BRO) and the best and worst performers in the insurance brokers industry.
